name: Eurythmics
bio: Eurythmics still earns because its biggest synth-pop songs remain instantly recognizable and unusually useful across playlists, film memory, and cultural nostalgia.
notable_for: A defining synth-pop catalog built on strong hooks, distinctive production, and enduring replay value.
career_highlight: Sweet Dreams (Are Made of This) remains one of the strongest evergreen songs of the synth-pop era.
